title: obslog structured log record
description: Language-neutral contract for ONE structured log line (ADR-0018). This file — not any single language's code — is the shared core. The OTel logs data model is the wire format; each language ships a thin, idiomatic emitter (Python: structlog/obslog; Go: slog/zap; TS: pino) that conforms to this shape. Well-known keys are pinned here; per-call fields are free (additionalProperties).

message.description: The human-readable message. OTel maps it to the LogRecord Body; agents recognize `message` as the display line by convention (Cloud Logging / Datadog / OTel filelog). Was `event` (structlog default) pre-0017.

service.namespace.description: OTel resource: the domain, e.g. ziggymart.

service.version.description: OTel resource: worker Build ID when present.

trace_id.description: Correlation key across logs, traces, and search attributes.

exception.description: Structured traceback on error logs (shape is language-dependent).
